name: Shengda Resources Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shengda Resources Co.,Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of non-ferrous metals in China. It primarily mines for lead, zinc, and silver. The company was formerly known as Shengda Mining Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shengda Resources Co.,Ltd. in October 2019. The company is based in Beijing, China.
